name_en: M45256 Black Polka Dot M21753 LV x YK NéoNoé Medium handbag comes from the Louis Vuitton x Yayoi Kusama collaboration series, condensing the creative energy of the infinite polka dot world. Monogram embossed calfskin reflects Kusama's iconic polka dots, while a detachable pumpkin-shaped decoration adds the artist's visual signature.
name_cn:
M45256 Black Polka Dot M21753 LV x YK NéoNoé Medium handbag comes from the Louis Vuitton x Yayoi Kusama collaboration series, condensing the creative energy of the infinite polka dot world. Monogram embossed calfskin reflects Kusama's iconic polka dots, while a detachable pumpkin-shaped decoration adds the artist's visual signature.
size: 26x26x17.5cm
